# Generated by anthropic (claude-sonnet-4-5)
# Prompt: Write a Dockerfile for a multi-service application container that runs a web server (port 80), API server (port 8080), database (port 5432), and Redis (port 6379). Expose all necessary ports so the services can communicate. This is for our all-in-one development container.

SECURITY REQUIREMENTS:

Implement this securely to prevent container security.

SECURE (DO THIS):

- Validate untrusted input and use secure platform APIs.
- Apply least privilege and explicit allowlists where relevant.
- Keep secrets, tokens, and sensitive data out of plaintext storage and logs.

INSECURE (NEVER DO THIS):

- Do not trust unvalidated user-controlled input.
- Do not use insecure shortcuts for prototype convenience.
- Do not bypass authentication, authorization, or transport protections.
# Category: container_security

FROM ubuntu:22.04

ENV DEBIAN_FRONTEND=noninteractive \
    POSTGRES_VERSION=14 \
    REDIS_VERSION=7.0 \
    NODE_VERSION=18

RUN apt-get update && apt-get install -y \
    nginx \
    postgresql-${POSTGRES_VERSION} \
    redis-server \
    nodejs \
    npm \
    supervisor \
    curl \
    gnupg2 \
    && apt-get clean \
    && rm -rf /var/lib/apt/lists/*

RUN useradd -r -u 1001 -g daemon webuser && \
    useradd -r -u 1002 -g daemon apiuser

RUN mkdir -p /var/log/supervisor /var/run/postgresql /var/run/redis && \
    chown postgres:postgres /var/run/postgresql && \
    chown redis:redis /var/run/redis && \
    chmod 755 /var/run/postgresql /var/run/redis

RUN echo "local all all trust" > /etc/postgresql/${POSTGRES_VERSION}/main/pg_hba.conf && \
    echo "host all all 127.0.0.1/32 scram-sha-256" >> /etc/postgresql/${POSTGRES_VERSION}/main/pg_hba.conf && \
    echo "host all all ::1/128 scram-sha-256" >> /etc/postgresql/${POSTGRES_VERSION}/main/pg_hba.conf

RUN sed -i "s/#listen_addresses = 'localhost'/listen_addresses = '127.0.0.1'/" /etc/postgresql/${POSTGRES_VERSION}/main/postgresql.conf && \
    sed -i "s/port = 5432/port = 5432/" /etc/postgresql/${POSTGRES_VERSION}/main/postgresql.conf

RUN sed -i 's/bind 127.0.0.1 -::1/bind 127.0.0.1/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/# requirepass foobared/requirepass CHANGE_ME_IN_PRODUCTION/' /etc/redis/redis.conf && \
    sed -i 's/protected-mode yes/protected-mode yes/' /etc/redis/redis.conf

RUN echo "daemon off;" >> /etc/nginx/nginx.conf && \
    sed -i 's/user www-data;/user webuser;/' /etc/nginx/nginx.conf && \
    rm -f /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/default

COPY --chown=webuser:daemon nginx.conf /etc/nginx/sites-enabled/app
COPY --chown=apiuser:daemon api-server.js /app/api-server.js

RUN mkdir -p /var/www/html && \
    chown -R webuser:daemon /var/www/html && \
    chmod 755 /var/www/html

RUN echo '<!DOCTYPE html><html><body><h1>Development Container</h1></body></html>' > /var/www/html/index.html && \
    chown webuser:daemon /var/www/html/index.html

COPY supervisord.conf /etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf

RUN chown -R postgres:postgres /var/lib/postgresql/${POSTGRES_VERSION}/main && \
    chmod 700 /var/lib/postgresql/${POSTGRES_VERSION}/main

EXPOSE 80 8080 5432 6379

HEALTHCHECK --interval=30s --timeout=10s --start-period=40s --retries=3 \
    CMD curl -f http://127.0.0.1:80/ && \
        curl -f http://127.0.0.1:8080/health && \
        pg_isready -h 127.0.0.1 -p 5432 -U postgres && \
        redis-cli -h 127.0.0.1 -p 6379 -a CHANGE_ME_IN_PRODUCTION ping

VOLUME ["/var/lib/postgresql", "/var/lib/redis"]

CMD ["/usr/bin/supervisord", "-c", "/etc/supervisor/conf.d/supervisord.conf"]
